name: extract-rules-from-url.sh --shape pdf-sections segments pdftotext-style output by section labels (ADR-0009 line 51)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r03-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'V14.1 Data Protection
Encrypt data at rest.
V14.2 Access Control
Enforce least privilege.
V14.3 Audit Logging
Log all admin operations.
' > $OUT/s.txt; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source $OUT/s.txt --shape pdf-sections --source-id r03 --json 2>e.err | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d))' > n.out; N=$(cat n.out); grep -q 'shape=pdf-sections' e.err && [ "$N" = "3" ] && echo pdf-sections-yields-segments 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
